text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's the final G1 race of spring—the Takarazuka
Kinen! Which one of these fine competitors will
cross the finish line first?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Each and every one of these Umamusume carry
the hopes of their fans on their shoulders... and
here they come to the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The venue for the Takarazuka Kinen is the
Hanshin Racecourse, as scheduled.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have a final meeting in the waiting room to
wrap up some loose ends before the race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's go over some things. Were you able to
get data on the other runners, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Excellent. Let's look over them while we—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: No, not at all. This is... amazing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You even have data on their training methods
here. Looking at this, it seems like it will be an
intense race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm, the runner-up of the pre-race favorite poll
will likely pull away at the third turn, so I should
be ready by the second turn. And...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The data I collected prove helpful, and we have a
very productive meeting together.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Give it up for the grand winner of our pre-race
favorite poll!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's right! And I'm about to prove to everyone
who voted for me that they picked the winning
racer!
